name: OpenAI
description: OpenAI API platform for GPT models, embeddings, and AI capabilities

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to platform.openai.com
2. Go to API Keys
3. Create a new secret key
4. Paste it below

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: OpenAI → Platform → API Keys → Create new secret key
